hero.heading: A designer who thinks in structure and sees in stories.
hero.body: I'm Shubham — a designer who found his way from Mechanical Engineering into Multimedia and Design. What started as curiosity slowly became a career built around visuals, systems, brands and digital experiences. I like creating work that looks good, communicates clearly, and feels useful to the people it's made for.

journey.title: Mechanical Engineering
journey.description: My first path taught me how to think in systems, understand structure, and break a problem down before trying to solve it.

journey.title: Multimedia & Design
journey.description: Curiosity about visual communication pulled me toward creative work. I switched into Multimedia and Design and started building a real design practice.

journey.title: Agency & Studio Experience
journey.description: Hands-on years working across graphic design, social media creatives, marketing assets and video — with real clients, real deadlines and real feedback.

journey.title: Bricks Media
journey.description: Branding, campaigns and digital assets built for consistent brand communication across multiple business categories.

journey.title: The Dot HQ
journey.description: Working on branding, social media creatives, marketing assets, digital campaigns and visual communication built for real audiences.

journey.title: UI/UX Course Completed
journey.description: Deepened my digital product thinking with a structured UI/UX course, extending my practice into interfaces, user flows and experience design.

experience_summary: Six-plus years of creative experience across graphic design, social media, branding, presentations, marketing assets, video, motion graphics and basic UI work — collaborating closely with marketing and business teams to ship real work at real pace.

philosophy.title: Clarity first
philosophy.body: Design should make information easier to understand — not harder to decode. If the message is muddy, no amount of polish saves it.

philosophy.title: Design with purpose
philosophy.body: Every decision should support a goal. Colour, type, layout and motion are tools, not decoration.

philosophy.title: Visual strength, quietly
philosophy.body: Strong hierarchy and confident spacing carry more weight than loud effects. I aim for work that reads well before it impresses.

philosophy.title: Made for the audience
philosophy.body: The best design fits the people it's for. I think about who's reading, scrolling or clicking before I open a canvas.

philosophy.title: Practical problem-solving
philosophy.body: Design lives in the real world. I care about production, deadlines, formats and how a file behaves after it leaves my screen.
